tools.name: ctx_cron_list
tools.description: List the current user's crontab entries

tools.name: ctx_cron_next
tools.description: Show a human-readable explanation of when a cron job will next run

tools.name: ctx_cron_explain
tools.description: Explain a cron expression in human-readable format
tools.command:
echo 'Cron expression: {{expression}}' && echo '{{expression}}' | awk '{printf "Minute: %s
Hour: %s
Day of Month: %s
Month: %s
Day of Week: %s
", $1, $2, $3, $4, $5}'
